text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I didn't end up running the way I<n>wanted to last
time, but... this time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With all these earnest Umamusume in<n>the race, I
have to be serious about<n>winning too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It would be disrespectful to them if I<n>don't show
that I learned from my<n>mistake!
choice_data_list: That's a good way to look at it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right? Like, maybe my running can<n>help draw out
the fight in my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The more passionate I run, the more<n>driven they'll
be—and the more I'll<n>see them sparkle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's essentially a feedback loop! My<n>never-ending
love generates their<n>fanservice! I'm gonna put my
whole<n>heart into this race!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't completely follow, but it<n>seems like Agnes
Digital is nice and<n>motivated!
